title: The strength we were taught is wrong
description: Break a bone — people sign your cast. Admit you're drowning — silence. We inherited a broken definition of strength. Time to rewrite it. #Shorts #MentalHealth #SelfDevelopment #MensHealth
hook_visual: Text appears on a clean dark background in two beats — 'Break a bone → people sign your cast.' Cut to: 'Admit you're drowning →' then one full second of silence and a blank screen before the next line appears.
end_screen_cta: Hold on the reframe — 'Vulnerability isn't weakness. It's proof of strength.' — two seconds of stillness, then: 'Full story in my latest video. Link in bio.'
